records.title: problem_user sees one identical broken image for every product
records.acText: For problem_user, every product image collapses to the same broken placeholder (sl-404) instead of a distinct image per product.

records.title: all six product images render with distinct, non-empty sources
records.acText: All six products show distinct, non-empty image sources (one image per product).

records.title: all six product titles render exactly and in catalog order
records.acText: The six product titles match the catalog exactly, in Name A→Z display order.

records.title: every product shows its exact description
records.acText: Each product's description matches the catalog reference data exactly.

records.title: every product price is formatted with a leading dollar sign
records.acText: Each product price matches the catalog and is formatted as $NN.NN.

records.title: every product offers an enabled Add to cart button
records.acText: All six products show an enabled 'Add to cart' button.

records.title: hovering a product title turns its text the brand green (#3ddc91)
records.acText: Hovering a product title changes its computed text color to the brand green rgb(61, 220, 145).
